predictions.claim: The generated runtime refuses live employee data to deprecated, experiment, and lab_only variants, admits approved variants directly, and admits candidate variants on the live surface only under explicit operator acknowledgement.
predictions.falsifier: A lab_only or experiment manifest is admitted on the live_owner_workbench surface, or a candidate manifest is admitted without acknowledgement.

predictions.claim: A variant receives only the EmployeeExperienceModelV1 capabilities its manifest declares in required or optional; undeclared and intentionally omitted capabilities are neutral empty values.
predictions.falsifier: A capability absent from the manifest declaration reaches the variant component with live employee content.

predictions.claim: Every dispatched variant intent resolves to a closed UiVariantHostMethod union or a typed rejection code, and no fixture intent or high-risk direct intent executes on the live surface.
predictions.falsifier: A dispatched intent reaches a live Manager route without a declared model intent and an allowed host method.

predictions.claim: The generated runtime is implementable from ResourcePayload and the existing owner projection alone, with no Manager mutation, connector custody, or non-ResourcePayload employee read.
predictions.falsifier: A variant or the runtime requires non-ResourcePayload employee data, connector custody, or authority/approval/effect mutation.

predictions.claim: Phase 1 live workbench contracts, the UI architecture verifier, the UI system validator, and web typecheck stay green on the exact candidate.
predictions.falsifier: npm run test:ui:contracts, node scripts/verify-ui-architecture.mjs, node scripts/validate-ui-system.mjs, or npm run typecheck --workspace @amtech/web fails.

stop_conditions: A variant or the generated runtime requires non-ResourcePayload employee data, connector custody, or authority/approval/effect mutation.
Implementation would require a new Manager endpoint, browser credential custody, migration, provider adapter, or Hermes change.
Implementation would require promoting a variant manifest, preset, or fixture.
Patch scope exceeds 26 files without a recorded re-admission.
Any P4 claim would be needed to discharge a proof obligation.

provenance.chronology: predictions are recorded before plan admission and outcomes
